title: Expose build/provision epoch diagnostics in gateway status
description: Why this exists: the HAL time provider exposes build_epoch, effective_epoch_floor, provision_epoch_valid, provision_epoch, and rejection reasons, but gateway status CBOR currently exposes wall-clock fields without the epoch-floor diagnostics that clients need to explain GNSS cold-start/default-time rejection. What needs to be done: extend lichen/apps/gateway/src/status_cbor.c and tests to include build_epoch, effective_epoch_floor, provision epoch validity/value, and source/rejection metadata consistent with docs/firmware-time-provider.md and spec/11-lci.md. No hardware required; validate with native_sim/qemu Twister for lichen/tests/gateway_status and related app-interface/HAL tests.
notes: Implementation: gateway status CBOR now emits time_passed_epoch_floor, time_build_epoch, time_effective_epoch_floor, time_provision_epoch_valid, conditional time_provision_epoch, and conditional rejection-source diagnostics time_reject_source_class, time_reject_source, time_reject_passed_epoch_floor while preserving existing time_reject omission when there is no rejection. HAL now retains below-floor time submissions in diagnostic-only state and exposes rejection_source_* metadata separately from accepted wall-clock source metadata; provision epoch set/clear and accepted/stale submissions clear stale diagnostics as appropriate. Gateway CoAP message size increased to cover the larger advertised status CBOR bound. Tests extended in lichen/tests/gateway_status, lichen/tests/hal, and lichen/tests/app_interface. Validation on EC2 us-east-2a builder with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr: focused command 'west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -T lichen/tests/hal -T lichen/tests/app_interface -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-vfdi-focused --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-vfdi/lichen' passed 11/14 configs, 3 static-filter skips, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 222 test cases executed. Full command 'west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -T lichen/tests/hal -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/apps/gateway -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-vfdi --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-vfdi/lichen' passed 15/22 configs, 7 static-filter skips, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 384 test cases executed; gateway app build-only native_sim/qemu_x86 passed. Reviews: multiple earlier review findings fixed (CBOR bound, time_reject compatibility, gateway app message size, real HAL diagnostic path, diagnostic-only sample storage, provision-clear stale rejection, active rejection-source metadata). Final independent review agents 019f25a4-3dff-7360-ae8a-5169d040748a, 019f25a4-6daa-7f00-9d97-6cb37c3d37ef, and 019f25a4-54b5-7cf1-844b-1230d0676ace reported no P0/P1/P2 findings.
close_reason: Completed: gateway status now exposes build/effective/provision epoch diagnostics and active rejection-source metadata; HAL retains below-floor time samples as diagnostic-only state without promoting stale diagnostics; native_sim/qemu Twister and gateway app build-only validation passed on EC2; final three independent reviews reported no P0/P1/P2 findings.
